titles.title: Cause Me to Come to Thy River Oh Lord

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Cause me to come to Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to come to Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to come to Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to come Cause me to drink Cause me to live

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Cause me to drink from Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to drink from Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to drink from Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to come Cause me to drink Cause me to live

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Cause me to live by Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to live by Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to live by Thy river, Oh Lord, Cause me to come Cause me to drink Cause me to live
